chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ شَيْ‏ءٌ مِنَ الْحَقِّ فِي يَدِ النَّاسِ إِلَّا مَا خَرَجَ مِنْ عِنْدِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ أَنَّ كُلَّ شَيْ‏ءٍ لَمْ يَخْرُجْ مِنْ عِنْدِهِمْ فَهُوَ بَاطِلٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 101 – There is nothing in the hands of the people from the truth except what came out from the presence of the Imams<sup>asws</sup>, and that every thing which did not come out from them<sup>asws</sup>, so it is false

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/307)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/307)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ لَيْسَ عِنْدَ أَحَدٍ مِنَ النَّاسِ حَقٌّ وَ لَا صَوَابٌ وَ لَا أَحَدٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ يَقْضِي بِقَضَاءٍ حَقٍّ إِلَّا مَا خَرَجَ مِنَّا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ وَ إِذَا تَشَعَّبَتْ بِهِمُ الْأُمُورُ كَانَ الْخَطَأُ مِنْهُمْ وَ الصَّوَابُ مِنْ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim Bin Hashim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Ibn  Muskan, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,

‘I heard Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘There isn’t any truth with anyone from the people, nor any correctness, nor is any one from the people judging with a rightful judgment except what came out from us<sup>asws</sup> the People<sup>asws</sup> of the Household, and when the matters branched out with them, the errors were from them and the correctness was from Ali<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from ibn Muskan from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following. “I heard abu Ja‘far (a.s.) say, ‘No one of the people has anything true with him, or correct nor does anyone of the people judge with truth except by means of what is made available from Ahl al-Bayt (members of the family of Prophet Muhammad). When the affairs grow branches and scatter chaotically the mistake would be from them and the correct solution from Ali (a.s.).”
